title: Revised rate of Dearness Relief to the State Govt Pensioners/family Pensioners of w.e.f 01-01-2026.
COUNCIL OF MINISTERS MEETING NEI
content:
583/2026-2027

Aizawl the 18th May 2026:Vawiin khan Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma kaihhruaiin Council of Ministers Meeting chu Cabinet Room-ah neih a ni a. A hnuaia mite hi an pawm (Approved).

1. Proposal for allocation of School Education land at Aizawl Venglai bearing DLL 41 of 1992 to Local Council, Aizawl Venglai _ GAD

2. Appointment of Pi Renu Sharma, IAS (Retd.) former Chief Secretary to the Government of Mizoram, as Advisor to the Government of Mizoram on re-employment basis _ DP & AR

3. The draft Mizoram Engineering Service Rules, 2026 _ DP&AR

4. Proposal to reconsider the decision of the Council of Ministers in its H&TE meeting held on 09.09.2019 so that regular appointment of existing 58 (fifty eight) Assistant Professors, who had been engaged on fixed remuneration in various Government Colleges, against the 72(seventy two) posts created for implementation of RUSA Scheme. _ H & TE

5. Approval and Implementation of the Mizoram Startup Policy, 2026 _ P&PI

6. Proposal for provincialization of various categories of Adhoc Grant-in-Aid Schools under School education Department. _ School Education.

7. Draft the Mizoram Regulation of Fireworks Bill, 2026. _ Home.

8. The Aizawl City, Traffic Police Warden Scheme, 2026. _ Home.

9. The Mizoram Water Information and Governance Bill, 2026. _ I&WR

10. Matter relating to the imposition of penalty against 10(ten) convicted employees of CADC _ DC&MA

11. Clarification on exemption of royalty on broom grass/broom stick. _ EF&CC

12. Proposal for approval of the Mizoram Visit Bharat - Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevika Mission (Gramin) Scheme, 2026 _ RD & A

13. Draft the Mizoram State Medical Council of Homoeopathy Bill, 2025. _ H&FW

14. Proposal for the Mizoram Fisheries (Amendment) Rules, 2026 _ Fisheries

15. The Mizoram Inner Line Pass Guidelines, 2026. _Home

16. Establishment of Mizoram Urban Development Company under The Companies Act, 2013 _ UD&PA

17. Proposal for allotment of Home Department land at Armed Veng South bearing Land Lease DLL 41 of 2010 to Armed Veng East Presbyterian Church. _ GAD

18. The draft Aizawl Municipal Corporation Building (Amendment) Regulations, 2026 _ UD&PA Decision - Kept in Abeyance

title: SERCHHIP DISTRICT SPECIAL CELL FOR SOLID WASTE MANAGEMENT THUKHAWM | VILLAGE ACTION PLAN SAWI HO A NI
content:
582/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 18th May 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip Deputy Commissioner kaihhruianain Serchhip District-a 'Special Cell for Solid Waste Management' chuan felfai leh mumal zawka bawlhhlawh chi hrang hrangte sawngbawl dan tur 'Village Action Plan' sawi hona, DC Meeting Hall, Serchhip-ah an nei.

He thutkhawm kaihruaitu Deputy Commissioner, Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan India ram pumah bawlhhlawh sawngbawl dan kawngah dan zawm tha lo an tam avangin Supreme Court chuan May ni 5, 2026 khan dan zawm tha tura thu chhuah a siam tih a sawi a. He thuchhuah leh Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026 tlawhchhanin Serchhip District chhunga khawpui (town) leh thingtlang (village) khaw tinahte chak taka hmalak dan tur ruahmanna hrang hrang siam a nih thu a sawi a; Khawtlang hruaitute leh mipuite tawiawmnate, khawtlang tanrualnate a pawimawh thu sawiin, faina leh hriselna kawngah mi dangte tana entawntlak nih tum theuh turin mi tinte a sawm a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Deputy Commissioner Office-a Superintendent, Pu F. Lallawmkima'n bawlhhlawh sawngbawl dan tur chungchanga ruahmanna 'Village Action Plan' tlangpui sawi zauna a neih hnuin sawi hona neih zui a ni a. Hetah hian chhungkaw tinte mawhphurhna tur te, Village Level Solid Waste Management Committee (VSWMC) mawhphurhna tur te, Village Council leh Block Development Officer-te leh department hrang hrang mawhphurhnate sawi ho a ni.

He ruahmanna hnuaiah hian bawlhhlawhte chu chi li (4) - Wet Waste (tawih thei); Dry Waste (tawih thei lo); Sanitary Waste (zun leh ek thiarna thil hrang hrang etc.) Special Care Waste (rawng bur, damdawi chhia, e-waste etc.)-ahte thliar hran vek tur niin, a paihna tura siamahte chauh paih tur a ni dawn a. Hei bakah hian khaw chhunga bawlhhlawh hal khap tlat a ni dawn a, dan zawm lo leh bawhchhetute chu Solid Waste Management Rules Section 21 hmangin hremna khauh tak pek theih an ni dawn a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian sawrkar department hrang hrang aiawhte — Police, DRDO, DUDO, PHED, Health, EF&CC, RD&AD, MPCB, I&PR  te bakah khawtlang hruaitu Village Council aiawhte an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: LEIVUNG PAIH CHUNGCHANGA AIZAWL DC THUCHHUAH
content:
581/2026-2027

Aizawl the 18th May, 2026:Aizawl District huam chhunga kawng laih mekna hmun hrang hrang -Four-Laning of Vairengte to Sairang Road on NH 306 and 06 (Package 8), Two-Laning of Aizawl Bypass including Tunnel (Package 2 & 3) leh Aizawl Bypass on Western Side-ah te hian tunah kawng laih hna thawh mek a ni a. Heng kawng laihna hmun hrang hrang ah te hian leivung paihna tur hmun (Designated Spoil Bank) ruat vek an ni a.

Contractor-te’n project hrang hrang atana leivung paihna tur hmun (spoil bank site) an rawn rawtna te uluk taka zirchian a nih hnuah District Level Monitoring Committee on Environment (DLMCE) chuan leivung paihna hmun tur (designated Spoil Bank) Annexure-a tarlan te hi a phalsak a.

Heng Project hrang hrang ah te hian leivung hi a paihna hmun tur ni lo ah paih an lo awm theih avangin, DLMCE chuan leivung paihna hmun ah chauh paih tur in hna thawktute a lo hriattir tawh bawk a.Leivung paihna tur a hmun ruat lawk (designated spoil bank) ni lo hmun dangah leivung paih an awm a nih chuan, a mawhphurtu te chu dan anga hrem theih an ni.

DLMCE in chhun zan zawmin heng kawnglaih hnathawhna hmun hrang hrang te hi a vil reng theih loh avangin; kawng laih mekna hmun huamchhunga Local Council/Village Council, Young Mizo Association (YMA), khawtlang thatna tura pawl hrang hrang (Non-Government Organisation and Community Based Organisation) leh mipuite pawh heng kawng laihna hmun hrang hrangah hian leivungte hi a paihna tur hmun dik takah paih a ni ngei em tih min lo enpuia, thu zawm lo te chu thuneitute hnena thlen vat turin kan in ngen e.

He ngenna hiGRASSROOT GOVERNANCEhmalakna hnuaiah chhuah a ni e.

AIZAWL DISTRICT HUAM CHHUNGA PROJECT HRANG HRANGA LEIVUNG PAIH PHALNA HMUN TE.pdf

title: MIZORAM STATE HEALTHCARE SOCIETY CEO THUCHHUAK
content:
580/2026-2027

Aizawl the 18th May, 2026:Sawkar hnathawk (Regular Govt, employees) leh mipui nawlpui man chawia inziak lut (General beneficiaries) tan mahni awm hmun atanginmuhcs.mizoram.gov.inportal ah lutin MUHCS Card dil (apply) theih a ni a. Apply (dil) rual hian chhungkaw member tin Aadhaar Card leh thlalak - awm (chest) leh a chung lam lang fiah tak - 'upload' tel tur a ni. Naupang kum 5 hnuai lam tan MUHCS Card siam a ngai lo a, a nu emaw a pa card a hmang thei ang. Approval (pawmpuina) hi Mizoram State Health Care Society-in a lo pek fel hunah card chu mahni in 'download' theih a ni ang. Mahni a MUHCS Card dil tur tan Mizoram State Health Care Society Youtube Channel-ah card dil dan kaihhruaina video en theih a ni.

A chunga tarlan ni lo category dang, heng - Civil Pensioner leh GIA employee tan tun dinhmunah MUHCS Card a la siam theih loh thung. Amaherawhchu, damdawi ina enkawl ngai an nih chuan scheme-a an inziahluhna lehkha (Subscription form) hmanginMUHCS 2.0 hnuaia hamthatna an dawng thei ang.

AB PM-JAY (Golden Card) hmang thei chhungkua tan Golden Card neih sa hmangin MUHCS hnuaia hamthatna a dawn theih a, a hranpa a MUHCS Card siam a ngailo a ni.

title: Padma Vibhushan, Padma Bhushan leh Padma Shri 2027 chungchangah Deputy Commissioner, Hnahthial District in hriattirna a ti chhuak
content:
579/2026-2027

Hnahthial the 18thMay, 2026:Padma Vibhushan, Padma Bhushan leh Padma Shri 2027 chungchangah Deputy Commissioner in hriattirna a ti chhuak

NOTICE

Sawrkar laipui chuan civilian te tana dawn theih chawimawina sang ber heng:Padma Vibhushan, Padma Bhushan leh Padma Shri te chu kum 2027 atan a hlan leh dawn a.

Hemi dawng thei tur te chu Art, Literature leh Education, Sports, Medicine, Social Work, Science and Engineering, Public Affairs, Civil Service, Trade and Industry etc. lama thawk tha chungchuang an ni tur a ni.

Hemi chawimawina te dawng tlak nia inhria emaw, dawng tura rawt duh nei tan rawt theih a ni a. Dilna/Rawtna (Lehkha in/offline) chu tahrik Ni. 19.06.2026 hma in Deputy Commissioner Office, Hnahthial ah thehlut duh chuan a thehluh theih ang. Online in Government of India, Ministry of Home Affairs ah tahrik Ni 25.06.2026 ai a tlailo ah thehluh theih bawk a ni.

Sd/-

K. VANLALRUATI

Deputy Commissioner

Hnahthial District, Hnahthial

title: Fur chhunga In sak leh thil dang vanga lei laih leh a kaihhnawih kalpui lo turin Bawrhsap in thuchhuah a siam
content:
578/2026-2027

Hnahthial the 15thMay, 2026 : Fur chhunga In sak leh thil dang vanga lei laih leh a kaihhnawih kalpui lo turin Bawrhsap in thuchhuah a siam

NOTICE

Fûrpui kan thleng chho leh dawn ta a; South-West Monsoon hi May thlaah thleng tlangpuiin, September/October thlengin ruah nasa tak a sur chhunzawm thin a ni.

Lo neitute tana malsawmna pawimawh tak a nih laiin, fûr hian harsatna leh channa nasa tak a thlen thin a, Mizoram chhungah ruahsur vanga leimin in chhiatna nasa tak a thlen thin a ni.

Chuvangin, ruahpui lo thleng tur thlir chung leh ruahtui tla in chhiatna a thlen theih laka inbuatsaihna tha tak kan neih theih nan,

Disaster Management Act, 2005 Section 34(m) hnuaiah hetiang hian thupek hi ka tichhuak a ni -

Hnahthial Town chhungah hian In sakna tur emaw, thil dang emaw atana lei laih leh a kaihhnawih engmah kalpui tur a ni lo. Lei laih leh a kaihhnawih mamawhna pawimawh/tul tak a awm a nih chuan thuneitute hnen atangin phalna lak hmasak phawt tur a ni.

He thupek hi vawiin May ni 15, 2026 atang hian hman nghal tur a ni a, thla thum chhung hman phawt a ni ang. He thupek bawhchhia chu Section 51-a tarlan angin kum khat chhung Lung In a tan tir emaw, pawisa chawitir emaw, a pahnihin emaw a hremna pek a ni ang.

Sd/-

K. VANLALRUATI

Deputy Commissioner & Chairman

District Disaster Management Authority

Hnahthial District, Hnahthial

Attachment

title: SPECIAL INVESTIGATION TEAM LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT HOLDS MEETING
content:
92/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 18th May 2026:The Special Investigation Team (SIT), Lawngtlai District, held a meeting today at the Deputy Commissioner’s Office Chamber under the chairmanship of Lawngtlai Deputy Commissioner Shri Donny Lalruatsanga.

During the meeting, Shri Donny Lalruatsanga expressed gratitude to all members present and emphasized the importance of protecting and conserving Riverine Reserved Forests and Reserved Forest Areas under the jurisdiction of the Lai Autonomous District Council (LADC) and the Chakma Autonomous District Council (CADC). He stated that every possible effort must be made to safeguard these forest areas. The Deputy Commissioner stressed the need to verify whether any “Land Passes” had been issued within Reserved Forest Areas and Riverine Reserved Forest areas. In this regard, he specifically instructed the Senior Revenue Officers of both LADC and CADC to conduct thorough verification. He also highlighted that governments across the world are now giving significant importance to forest conservation and reiterated the need for continued dedication towards protecting Reserved Forests and Riverine Reserved Forests.

During the meeting, it was reported that no “Land Pass” had been issued within Reserved Forest Areas. However, it was decided that field verification would be carried out to determine whether any “Land Passes” exist within Riverine Reserved Forest areas.

Under CADC jurisdiction, inspections will be conducted within an 800-metre stretch from Tuichawng Lui. Under LADC jurisdiction, inspections will be carried out within 800 metres along Chhimtuipui River, Tuichawng (LADC Area), and Sekulh Lui. The verification exercise will be jointly undertaken by the Revenue and Forest Departments of LADC and CADC over a period of three weeks. After completion of the verification and preparation of the final report, it will be submitted to the Government of Mizoram. The meeting also resolved that the Special Investigation Team should continue making every effort to protect Riverine Reserved Forests and Reserved Forest Areas.

The meeting was attended by the SDO (S), Senior Revenue Officers of LADC and CADC, the District Council Conservator of Forest, and the Deputy Conservator of Forest (Wildlife). The meeting concluded with a vote of thanks from Shri  Donny Lalruatsanga.

title: SPECIAL INVESTIGATION TEAM LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT THUTKHAWM
content:
577/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 18th May 2026 :Vawiin khan Special Investigation Team, Lawngtlai District-chuan Deputy Commissioner Office Chamber-ah thutkhawm an nei a. Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan thutkhawm hi a kaihruai.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Member kalkhawmte hnena lawmthu sawina a nei a. LADC leh CADC huamchhunga Riverine Reserved Forest leh Reserved Forest Areas- te venhim leh enkawl chu thil pawimawh tak a ni tiin, hemi kawngah hian theihtawp chhuah a tul hle a ni, a ti. Reserved Forest Areas leh Riverine Reserved Forest huamchhungah 'land pass' pek a awm em tih zawnchhuah chu thil tul tak a ni tiin, a bik takin LADC leh CADC - a Sr. Revenue Officer - te lo enfiah turin a chah a. Tunlai khawvelah Ramngaw humhalh kawngah sawrkar a intlansiak nasa tawh hle tih sawiin, Ramngaw humhalh pawimawhna hre reng bawkin, Bawrhsap chuan thahnemngai taka Riverine Reserved Forest leh Reserved Forest Areas- te humhalh a nih tur thu a tarlang a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian Reserved Forest Areas bikah chuan 'Land Pass' pekchhuah a awm lo tih report ngaihthlak a ni a. Riverine Reserved Forest - huamchhunga 'Land Pass ' awm leh awm loh chu a hmunah kal a zirchian ni se tih a ni a. CADC huamchhungah Tuichawng Lui atanga 800 M chinah endikna kalpui a ni dawn a, LADC huamchhungah chuan Chhimtuipui, Tuichawng ( LADC Area) leh Sekulh Lui dung 800 M chinah endikna kalpui a ni thung ang. Zirchianna hi LADC leh CADC- a Revenue leh Forest Department ten kar thum chhung an kalpui ang a, report peih fel a nih hunah Mizoram State Sawrkarah report - an thehlut leh dawn a ni. Riverine Reserved Forest leh Reserved Forest Areas- humhalh turin Special Investigation Team ten theihtawp chhuah zel ni se an ti bawk a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian SDO (S), LADC leh CADC - a Sr. Revenue Officer, District Council Conservator of Forest, Deputy Conservator Of Forest (WL) te an tel thei a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

title: MYC IN CERTIFICATE HLAN
content:
576/2026-2027

Aizawl the 18th May, 2026:Ministry of tribal affairs atanga fund an hmuh hmangin, MYC-in mizo thalai lehkha thiam sang lote pualin a thlawna mipa lu meh thla khat leh a chanve chhung MT Cutz a training leh hmeichhe sam tan, thla thum chhung Nuseni parlor-a training zo mi 27-te hnenah certificate hlanna hun, MYC conference hall-ah an hmang.

Training chhuakte hian anmahnia hna an thawh tan nghal theihna turin an hmanraw mamawh an pe/hand hold vek bawk.Pi Lalramdini, US, MYC-in a kaihruai a, Pi V. Lalmuanpuii, secretary, MYC in thu a sawi. Trainer leh training chhuakte atangin thutawi ngaihthlak a ni bawk.

Pu Malsawmzuala Ralte, chairman MYC chuan fuihna thusawiin, thiamna leh theihna inang rau rauvah dawrtu che u lungawina thlen thiam apiangin pan in hlawh zel ang a, hma in sawn chak thei ang. Engkimah Pathian tanpuina dil fo a, a malsawm tlaka thawhrim hi a pawimawh ber, tih a sawi.

Attachment

title: SAITUALAH LOK SABHA MP HOIN SAWRKAR LAIPUI SCHEME KALPUI DAN THLIR LETNA- DISHA MEETING NEIH A NI
content:
575/2026-2027

Saitual, the 18th May, 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Saitualah District Development Coordination & Monitoring Committee (DISHA) chu an Chairman, Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha, Member of Parliament (Lok Sabha) hoin an thukhawm a, Sawrkar laipui (Centrally Sponsored Scheme) kalpuitu Department hrang hrang hmalakna te an thlirho nghal a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Lok Sabha MP Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha chuan kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu a sawi a, mipuite hmasawn nan Sawrkar laipui scheme pawimawh tak tak duan thin a ni, a ti a, heng scheme kalpui a nih dan te leh line department thawh chin te inhriatpawh tawn nan DISHA meeting hi quarter tin neih thin a ni tih a sawi. Sawrkar laipui scheme (Centrally Sponspored Scheme) te chu mipuite chawikan nan leh ram hmasawn nan a pawimawh hle a ni tih sawiin, heng scheme kalpuitu department hotute chu thahnemngai taka thawk zel turin a sawm nghal a ni.

Lok Sabha MP chuan Saitual Bawrhsap kaihhruaina hnuaiah zirna lam pawhin hma a sawn chhoh zel a beisei thu a sawi a, HSLC leh HSSLC exam-ah te pass percentage tha zawk Saitual district-in a neih theih nan tan lak a tul hle a ni, a ti bawk. Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha chuan Saitual District-a DISHA meeting tluang taka neih a ni thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, line department te leh khawtlang hruaitute chuan thawhhona tha tak nei chhunzawm a, theih tawp chhuah zel turin a chah a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian department hrang hrang Rural development, Education, Agiculture, Horticulture, KVI, Social Welfare, Health & Family Welfare, Lead District Manager, UD&PA, Commerce & Industries, PHE, PWD, FCS & CA, CDPO, SP atang tein an department kaltlanga sawrkar scheme leh programme an kalpuite ngaihthlak a ni a. Hmachhawp an neih te leh scheme hrang hranga hlawhtlinna an lo neih tawh te an tarlang bawk a ni.

DISHA hi sawrkar laipui hmalakna viltu Committee a nih piah lamah Department hrang hrangte inkarah thawhhona tha siam a, an Scheme a hlawhtlin theihna tura thawhho dan kawng zawng tura din a ni. Vawiin thutkhawm hi Lok Sabha MP, DISHA chairman ni bawk, Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha chuan a kai hruai a, Saitual Bawrhsap, DISHA Member Secy ni bawk, Pu Srinivas Sadi bakah DISHA Member te leh khawtlang hruaitute an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: START UP MISSION WORKSHOP ON FOCUS 2.0 NEI
content:
574/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 18th May, 2026:Ni nga chhung (18.5.2026 – 22.5.2026) awh tur FOCUS 2.0 Start-Up Mission Workshop chu Conference Hall, Planning & Programme Implementation Deptt. (P&PID), Treasury Square ah vawiin khan neih tan a ni a, he workshop hmang tur hian IFAD mi leh sa bakah an consultant-te rawn kalin, FOCUS 2.0 project a thawhpui tur department leh Agency engemawzahin he workshop hawnna leh vawiin workshop hi an hmang a ni.

Pu David Lalthantluanga, IAS, Secretary, P&PID, in he workshop hi a hawng a, Pu Piyush Kanal, Country Programme Analyst, IFAD, leh Pu R. Vanrengpuia, Project Director, FOCUS 2.0, te’n kalkhawmte lawmna thu sawiin project hmachhawp an sawifiah bawk a ni.

Workshop hawnna hun hman a nih zawhah chawhma lamah Pi Girija Srinivasan, IFAD Consultant chuan project kalhmang tlangpui – project in a tum te, hmalak dan tur hrang hrang te, hmasawnna a thlen tura beisei te leh hmasawnna a thlen theih te a sawi a. Chawhnu lamah Pu Isak Lalmuanpuia Chuaungo, Joint Project Director (M&E) leh IFAD Consultant ten FOCUS chungchâng presentation pe-in hun an hmang chhunzawm a ni.

He workshop hian Ni 22.5.2026 (Zirtawpni) thleng a awh dawn a, hemi hun chhung hian IFAD leh consultant lokalte chuan project component hrang hrangah inzirtirna hun an hmang dawn a ni.

FOCUS 2.0 hmalakna turah hian department hrang hrangte nena thawhhona a pawimawh em em a. Project hi uluk taka duan niin a buatsaihna chungchangah pawh fimkhur taka ngaihtuah leh hmalaka ni a, a kalhmang leh nihphungte pawh uluk taka vawi engemaw zat ennawn leh sawiho a nih hnuah March thla khan Project Agreement tihfel a ni. Project kalpui hun chhung hi kum 6 a ni anga, District zawng zawng tuamin chhungkaw 75000 te dinhmun chawikang turin hmalakna a kalpui dawn a ni.

Attachment

title: “India ram pumpui min hrut tu SIR ah hian mipui leh ECI beiseina tihlawhtling turin tan kan lak a ngai” Dr Lalrozama
content:
573/2026-2027

Aizawl the 18th May, 2026:India ram pumpuiah a tahtawlin Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of Electoral Rolls neih mek niin Mizoramah pawh kalpui tan a lo ni ta a. “SIR ah hian mipui leh ECI beiseina tihlawhtling turin tan kan lak a ngai” tiin Chief Electoral Officer Dr Lalrozama chuan vawiina SP Conference Hall-a SIR chungchang training hawnnaah thu a sawi.

Mizoram puma Election Officer, Electoral Registration Officer, Assistant Electoral Registration Officer leh District Level Master Trainer te tana buatsaih ni khat awh training hawnnaah hian CEO chuan Electoral Roll an khawih dawn avangin fimkhur hle a tul thu a sawi a. Mizoram khua leh tui dik tak ten vote an neih theihna turin, tihsual leh hmaih nei hauh lo a, uluk leh fimkhur taka hna thawk turin a fuih.

Block Level Officer te chu an kut ke ber tur an nih avangin hmang thiam turin a chah a; langtlang leh rintlak E-roll buatsaih tura Political Party te pawimawhzia sawiin political party te ruat Block Level Agent te pawh tangkai taka hmang turin CEO Dr Lalrozama chuan kalkhawmte a sawm a ni.

Election Commission of India in May 14, 2026 khan SIR neih tur thu a puan tak avangin chak takin hmalak nghal a ni a. Vawiin training hi chawhma leh chawhnu a then niinJt CEO Pi Ethel Rothangpuiiprogram a kaihruai a. Mamit Election Officer Pu Lalnunfela Chawngthu, RD Deputy Director Pu Lalthakima, Khawzawl Election Officer Pu Timothy R. Lalhmangaiha leh Assistant Commisioner/ACEO Pi F. Lalnisai ten kal khawmte an zirtir a ni.

Attachment

title: Sports Minister in MBOCWWB ADFA Inter Village / Local Council Football Tournament 2026 Final telpui
content:
572/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 18th May, 2026:Zirtawp ni (15.05.2026) khan Sports Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan MBOCWWB ADFA Inter Village / Local Council Football Tournament 2026 Final chu Rajiv Gandhi Stadium, Mualpuiah a hmanpui.

Sports Minister chuan tournament buatsaihtute chungah lawmthu a sawi a. He hunah hian infiammite fuihna thu sawiin Inkhel entute pawh tan lam neia en an nih rualin an duhloh dan thutlukna awm theiah te pawh puitling taka insum thiam turin a chah a. ADFA hnenah thilpek a pe nghal bawk a ni.

He Final Match-ah hian Republic Veng leh Sihphir Venghlun te inkhelin Sihphir Venghlun  hian hnehna changin  Champion nomawi an chawi ta zawk a ni.

title: Transfer and posting/retention of IAS/NCS and other officers.
